somali.get_below_2_000_kg_co_year: Hoos u dhac ka hooseeya 2,000 kg CO₂/sannad
somali.design_5_fossil_energy_mix: Naqshadee isku-dar tamar oo leh <5% shidaal fosil
somali.answer_8_questions_correctly: Ka jawaab 8+ su'aalood si sax ah
somali.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Dhis isku-dar xal oo wadar ahaan 200+ Gt
somali.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Eber qiiq! Lugahaagu waa matoorka ugu cagaaran.
somali.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Raac wadaag — qiyaastii 0.3 kg CO₂ arday kasta safar kasta.
somali.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Baabuur wuxuu sii daayaa ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Safarrada kaligaa waa isku uruuraan si dhakhso ah.
somali.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Qaybinta safarrada waxay hoos u dhigtaa qiiqa qofkiiba 50-75%.
somali.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Miro, khudaar, hadhuudh, digir — raadka cuntada ugu hooseeya.
somali.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Hilib yar, khudaar yar. Cunto celceliseed.
somali.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Hilibka lo'da wuxuu soo saaraa 60 kg CO₂ kg kasta oo hilib ah.
somali.near_zero_operational_emissions: Qiiqa hawlgalka oo ku dhow eber.
somali.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Shabakadda Maraykanka: ~0.4 kg CO₂ kWh kasta.
somali.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Shabakadaha dhuxusha badan: ilaa 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
somali.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Bacriminta waxay ka leexisaa qashinka soo saara methane.
somali.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Dib-u-warshadayntu waxay badbaadisaa ~1 tan CO₂ tan kasta oo agab ah.
somali.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Qashin-qubyadu waxay soo saaraan methane (28× ka xoog badan CO₂).
somali.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Baabuur benziin Maraykan ah oo caadi ah: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
somali.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Wadaag saddex qof waxay hoos u dhigtaa qiiqa qofkiiba 65%.
somali.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Tareenka korontada ayaa 4× ka nadiifsan baabuur.
somali.improves_as_the_grid_decarbonizes: Waa hagaagaa marka shabakaddu kaarboon ka saarto.
somali.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Eber qiiq. Sidoo kale faa'iido caafimaad.
somali.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Duulimaadku wuxuu leeyahay saameyn kuleyl 2-3× ka badan CO₂ oo keliya.
somali.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Hal safar dheer oo laba-geesood ah = ~3 tan — sannad wadid dad badan.
somali.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e kg kasta oo hilib lo' ah — kan ugu sarreeya cunto kasta.
somali.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Soo-saaraha labaad ee ugu sarreeya, hilibka lo'da ka dib.
somali.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Way kala duwan tahay: salmon la beero sare, cod duurjoog ah hoose.
somali.dairy_cattle_also_produce_methane: Lo'da caanaha ayaa sidoo kale soo saarta methane.
somali.about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: Qiyaastii 1/10 saameynta cunto hilib lo' ah.
somali.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Digir + bariis + khudaar = raadka ugu hooseeya ee suurtogal ah.
somali.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Koobabka la iska tuuro waxay ku daraan ~50% marka la barbardhigo mid guriga lagu sameeyay.
somali.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gaaska dabiiciga ah: ~2 kg/therm. Jiilaalka oo keliya.
somali.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Celceliska shabakadda Maraykanka; hoose CA, sare WV.
somali.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Warbixinta Netflix 2023 — ka hooseysa qiyaasihii hore.
somali.camera_off_reduces_by_95: Daminta kamaradda waxay hoos u dhigtaa ~95%.
somali.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e prompt qoraal kasta. Su'aalaha macnaha dheer (1M token) waxay ku kacaan ~3× badan.
somali.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g sawir kasta. Culus 5–10× marka loo eego qoraal.
somali.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g clip kasta. Wuu kordhaa si toos ah dhererka clip + tayada. Culus 50×+ marka loo eego qoraal.
somali.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g clip gaaban kasta.
somali.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: prompt koodh macne dheer ~5g mid kasta.
somali.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyester = cimri dhan oo saarista saliidda.
somali.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Hay taleefannada 3+ sannadood si aad u kala badh saameynta sannadeedka.
somali.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Rarid 2 maalmood = 3× rarid ka gaabis ah.
somali.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Qashin-qubyadu waxay soo saaraan methane (28× ka xoog badan CO₂).
somali.negative_recycling_avoids_emissions: Taban! Dib-u-warshadayntu waxay ka fogaataa qiiqa.
somali.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Waxay ka fogaataa methane WAXAYNA dhistaa kaarboonka carrada.
somali.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Biyaha tuubada = ~500× ka nadiifsan qiiq ahaan.
somali.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Waxa qof kastaa u baahan yahay inuu gaadho 2030 si uu uga hooseeyo 1.5°C.
somali.near_net_zero_mix: Isku-dar u Dhow Eber Saafi ah
somali.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Magaalooyinka sida Burlington, Vermont ayaa horeba ugu shaqeeya koronto la cusboonaysiin karo 100%!
somali.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Faylal kala duwan ayaa ah habka ugu adkaysi badan.
somali.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Denmark waxay horeba ka heshaa 55% korontadeeda dabayl.
somali.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Adduunku wuxuu ku daraa tamar la cusboonaysiin karo si ka dhakhso badan wakhti kasta.
somali.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Deggan 10,000 sannadood. Cimilada Holocene ee ilbaxnimada aadanaha oo dhan ku koray.
somali.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling wuxuu bilaabaa kormeer joogto ah oo CO₂ ah Mauna Loa. Qalooca uu sameeyay ayaa caddeeyay in kuleylka ay keentay aadanuhu uu run yahay.
somali.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Saynisyahanka cimilada James Hansen wuxuu u sheegayaa Congress-ka Maraykanka in kuleylku bilowday. 350.org waxay u aragtaa 350 ppm inuu yahay xad “ammaan ah”.
somali.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Markii ugu horreysay ee CO₂ jawiga uu ka gudbay 400 ppm 3+ milyan sannadood. Xilligii ugu dambeeyay ee 400 ppm ee Dhulka: kaymaha kulaylaha ee ku yaal cirifyada.
somali.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Heerka hadda. Kan ugu sarreeya ugu yaraan 800,000 sannadood (ka soo qaadan cores baraf). Wuxuu la mid yahay ~1.2°C kuleyl.
somali.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Xad la xiriira kuleylka 2°C haddii uu socdo. Bartilmaameedka Heshiiska Paris: ka hooseysii 1.5°C.
somali.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Dhacdooyinka caddaanka coral ee ballaaran waxay dhufteen Great Barrier Reef 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, iyo 2024. Kuleyl 1.5°C, 70–90% reef coral kulaylaha ah ayaa dhinta. 2°C, 99% ayaa dhinta.
somali.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Xaashida barafka Greenland waxay haysaa biyo ku filan in ay kor u qaaddo heerka badda 7 mitir (23 ft). ~1.5°C oo socda, dhalaalku wuxuu noqonayaa mid aan la beddeli karin qarniyo ilaa kun sannadood.
somali.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Wareegga AMOC wuxuu kuleylka ka wareejiyaa kulaylaha una geeyaa Yurub. Wuxuu daciifay 15% tan iyo 1950. Joojin buuxda waxay si weyn u qaboojin doontaa Yurubta waqooyi iyadoo carqaladaynaysa monsoon-ka Afrika iyo Aasiya.
somali.amazon_rainforest_dieback: Hoos u dhaca Kaynta Roobka Amazon
somali.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon wuxuu dhaliyaa kala badh roobkiisa. Iyadoo la jaray kaymaha 20–25% + heerkul kordhaya, waxay khatar ku jirtaa in laga rogo kayn roobeed loo beddelo savanna. Qaar ka mid ah daraasadaha waxay soo jeediyaan in xadku uu u dhow yahay 2°C heerka jaridda kaymaha ee hadda.
somali.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost-ka Arctic wuxuu haystaa laba jibbaar kaarboonka hadda ku jira jawiga. Iyadoo kululaanaysa 3–4× ka dhakhso badan celceliska caalamiga, waxay horeba u dhalaalaysaa oo sii deysaa CO₂ iyo methane (28× ka xoog badan CO₂ 100 sannadood gudahood).
somali.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Xaashido baraf oo badeed ku salaysan oo lagu xidhay heerka badda hoostiisa. Biyaha badda ee kulul ayaa hoosta ka nabaadinaya. Glacier-ka Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) waa khatarta ugu weyn. Burburku wuxuu kor u qaadi doonaa heerka badda 3.3 mitir (11 ft).
somali.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Kaymaha waqooyiga ee conifer (Ruushka, Kanada, Scandinavia) waxaa cadaadis ku hayaa kuleyl, cayayaanka qolofta, iyo dabab kayn. Isbeddel buuxa oo loo beddelo cawska wuxuu sii deyn karaa kaarboon aad u tiro badan oo la kaydiyay.
somali.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Kuleylinta Dhakhsaha ah ee Gulf of Maine
somali.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine wuxuu kululaaday si ka dhakhso badan 99% badaha adduunka tan iyo 1980 — qiyaastii 0.5°F toban sannadoodkiiba, ku dhawaad 3× celceliska badweynta caalamiga. Qulqulka qabow ee Labrador ayaa daciifay halka biyaha kulul ee Gulf Stream ay gaadhaan waqooyi fog, iyaga oo dib u habaynaya shabakadda cuntada wakhtiga dhabta ah oo aasaas ah. Bulshooyinka xeebaha Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, iyo Mi’kmaq waxay isbeddelladan ku diiwaangeliyeen diiwaanka afka tobannaan sannadood ka hor intii dayax-gacmeedku xaqiijiyay.
somali.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Korontada ugu jaban adduunka 2024. Awoodda ayaa laba-jibbaaraysa sannad kasta gobollo dhowr ah.
somali.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Korontada ugu jaban taariikhda. Isku-darka shabakadda ayaa ah caqabadda ugu weyn hadda.
somali.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: La qaybiyay + adkaysi leh. Soo-celinta lacagta ee nidaamka caadiga ah ee 5kW: 6–10 sannadood.
somali.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 cuntada ayaa lumaya. Ka-hortagga khasaaraha wuxuu ka fogaadaa methane-ka qashin-qubka IYO qiiqa lagu beero cuntada.
somali.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ma aha 100% vegan — xitaa yaraynta hilibka lo'da 3× toddobaadkii waxay leedahay saameyn weyn. Waxay xoreysaa dhul dib-u-beerid kayn.
somali.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Soo-celi 125M hektar. Waxay ilaalisaa noolaha kala duwan + waxay hoos u soo jiiddaa CO₂ iyada oo loo marayo photosynthesis.
somali.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Ku beer meesha xaaladaha dabiiciga ah ay taageeraan koritaanka. Faa'iidooyin dheeraad ah: qaboojin, ilaalinta gobolka biyaha.
somali.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Ku darista geedaha dhulka daaqa. Xoolaha waxay helaan hadh; carradu waxay kaydisaa kaarboon 4× ka badan daaq bannaan.
somali.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Fal-la'aan + dalagyada daboolka + wareejin kala duwan. Waxay dhistaa kaarboonka carrada iyadoo la ilaalinayo wax-soo-saarka.
somali.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Dhulalka peat waxay kaydiyaan kaarboon 3× ka badan kaymaha caalamiga ah. Peat la miiray = qiiq-baxsade weyn.
somali.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: Gaasaska HFCs waa 1,000–9,000× ka xoog badan CO₂. Wax-ka-beddelka Kigali (2016) ayaa si tartiib ah u saaraya.
somali.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV waxay soo saaraan qiiq cimri dhan 50–70% ka yar benziin — waa hagaagaa marka shabakaddu nadiifto.
somali.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Tareennada korontadu waxay dhaqaajiyaan rakaab-km 1/10 qiiqa baabuurka.
somali.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Magaalooyinka baaskiisha ee Nederland waxay leeyihiin 1/3 qiiqa gaadiidka. Kaabayaashu waxay abuuraan dhaqan.
somali.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Kaydin kuleyl + bamaska kuleylka + iftiin LED. Dhismayaasha Maraykanku waxay isticmaalaan 40% tamarta aasaasiga ah.
somali.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Waxtar 3–4× ka badan foornooyinka gaaska. Waxay shaqeeyaan ilaa −15°C moodooyinka casriga ah ee cimilada qabow.
somali.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Si joogto ah ugu sarreeya. Haweenka wax bartay waxay leeyihiin caruur yar OO nolol saameyn sare leh. Way isku uruuraan qarniyo.
somali.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Waxay beddeshaa dabab qori/dhuxul. Faa'iidooyin: cimilo + wasakhda hawada gudaha (waxay disha 4M/sannad) + jaridda kaymaha.
somali.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Wuxuu koraa 60× ka dhakhso badan geedaha dhulka. Wuxuu kaydiyaa CO₂ + soo celiyaa kalluumeysiga + bacrin.
somali.other_waste_fugitive_aviation_bunkers: Kale (qashin, baxsad, shidaalka duulista iyo badda)
somali.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Qiiq Aad u Hooseeya — La Jaanqaadaya Paris
somali.very_high_fossil_fueled_growth: Aad u Sarreeya — Koritaan Shidaal Fosil Wado
somali.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Lug, baaskiil, ama bas ku aad dugsiga
somali.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Isku day hal cunto oo hilib la'aan ah toddobaadkii
somali.turn_off_lights_unplug_chargers: Dami nalalka oo ka bixi chargers
somali.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Beer geed ama bilow beer dugsi
somali.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Gaaban-hababka kiiboodhka: 1 ilaa 6 waxay beddelaan tabab, Q wuxuu beddelaa imtixaanka.
somali.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Dhoofi warbixintaada cimilada oo geli clipboard
somali.hero_ppm: CO₂ maanta: ~424 ppm — kan ugu sarreeya in ka badan 3 milyan sannadood
somali.mission_panel_copy: U guur xogta shakhsiga una guur caddaymo caalami ah, caddaalad, iyo xalal. Sheybaarada siyaasadda iyo riixista horumarsan way sii jiraan marka aad ballaadhiso.
somali.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Qoyska celceliska Maraykanka wuxuu sii daayaa ~16 tan CO₂/sannad. Wax-kicinta ugu waaweyn waa kuleylinta guriga, gaadiidka, iyo cunto-nolosha — ma aha caagagga plastikada.
somali.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Qorrax + dabayl ayaa hadda ka jaban warshadaha fosil ee cusub suuqyada intooda badan. Qaybta adag waa isku-darka shabakadda, ma aha kharashka wax-soo-saarka.
somali.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Cabbir joogto ah oo CO₂ ah Mauna Loa tan iyo 1958 — diiwaanka jawiga ugu socda muddada dheer. Qaabka ilkaha miinshaarka wuxuu ka yimaadaa photosynthesis-ka Waqooyiga Adduunka.
somali.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Xadadka halka nidaamku uu ka beddelo xaalad oo uu halkaas ku sii jiro — dhalaalka Greenland, hoos u dhaca Amazon, gaabinta AMOC. Shaqada dhawaan ayaa soo jeedinaysa in dhowr ay u dhowaan yihiin ka intii la moodayay.
somali.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Dalalka ugu qiiqa yar soo saaray ayaa la kulmaya saameynta ugu daran. Cimiladu waa arrin sinnaan marka hore — nuglaanshuhu wuxuu raacaa dakhliga, juqraafiga, iyo mas'uuliyadda taariikhiga ah.
somali.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown wuxuu kala saaraa 100 xal gigatons CO₂ ee laga fogaaday. Qaboojiyaha, khasaaraha cuntada, iyo waxbarashada gabdhaha ayaa liiska ugu sarreeya — ma aha waxa dadka badankiisu maleeyaan.
somali.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Waddooyinka Siyaasadda Cimilada: ololaha 40-sano ee Maine
somali.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Muujinta jaantuska donut ee raadka kaarboon ee Climate Explorer oo isdhexgal ah
somali.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Muujinta jadwalka wakhtiga qiiqa ee Climate Explorer oo isdhexgal ah
somali.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Heerka qiiqa CO2 caalamiga ah ee sannadlaha ah
somali.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Ku xidhan ~1.5°C kuleyl socda. Intooda badan la-qabsiga xeebaha ayaa weli suurtogal ah oo leh derbiyada badda, dib-u-gurasho la maareeyo.
somali.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: La xiriira ~2.5°C kuleyl. Waxay barakiciyaa dad ka badan dagaal kasta oo taariikhda. Mowjadda duufaanta waxay noqotaa masiibo gobollada gudaha.
somali.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: U badan 2300 3°C. Qaramo dhan ayaa lumiya dhul la deggan karo. New Orleans, Venice, iyo qayb weyn oo Vietnam.
somali.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Ballan qarniyo badan 4°C kuleyl. Waxay u baahan tahay burburka Greenland + Antarctica Galbeed. Juqraafiga xeebaha ee ilbaxnimada aadanaha si joogto ah ayaa dib loo qoraa.
somali.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Ku xidhan Greenland + inta badan Antarctica Galbeed oo lumay. Xeeb ka kulul xilligii Pliocene. Qarniyo ilaa kun sannadood si buuxda loo dhaqangeliyo.
somali.sea_level_rise_in_meters: Kororka heerka badda oo mitir ah
somali.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — fiiro: ~25% dhammaan CO₂ taariikhiga ah
somali.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Sannad rikoor ah — daadadka Pakistan oo keliya waxay barakiciyeen ~8.2M
somali.welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Soo dhawee dadka cimiladu horeba u dhaqaajinayso
somali.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Cadaadi ballanka Sanduuqa Khasaaraha iyo Waxyeelada inuu kordho
somali.read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Akhri dadka aad hadda ka maqashay
somali.show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Ka soo muuqo meesha go'aannada dhab ahaan lagu gaadho
somali.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Heshiiska Qaabdhismeedka UN ee Isbeddelka Cimilada
somali.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS waxay soo jeedisay Khasaaraha iyo Waxyeelada COP1 Berlin
somali.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC waxay bilowday la socodka barakaca cimilada
somali.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Heshiiska Paris — Qodobka 8 wuxuu xusayaa L&D
somali.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Xukunka UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
somali.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Warbixinta World Bank Groundswell Qaybta II
somali.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — Sanduuqa L&D la sameeyay
somali.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — Sanduuqa L&D la raasumaaliyeeyay
somali.first_l_d_fund_disbursements: Bixinta ugu horreysa ee Sanduuqa L&D
somali.ipcc_1_5_c_deadline_target_year: Waqtiga u dambeeya ee IPCC 1.5°C (sannad bartilmaameed)
somali.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Ma jiro dhacdo weyn oo siyaasadeed ama cimilo. Shaqada siyaasadda caadiga ah ayaa socotay.
somali.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Waxaad gaadhay kaarboon-yareyn qoto dheer oo dhinacyada dhan ah, waxaad dhistay adkaysi, waxaadna sinnaanta dhigtay bartamaha. Sidan ayay u eg tahay kala-guur cimilo oo guulaystay marka heshiiska bulshadu uu sii jiro.
somali.decarbonized_but_uneven: Kaarboon la Saaray laakiin Aan Sinnayn
somali.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Kaarboon-yaraynta muhiimka ah dhinacyada tamarta iyo gaadiidka, laakiin la-qabsiga iyo caddaaladda ayaa dib u dhacay. Qaloocyada kaarboonku waa sax; isbahaysiga siyaasadeed waa dabacsan yahay.
somali.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Qaar ka mid ah dhinacyada ayaa horay u socday. Kuwo kale way istaageen. Taageerada dadweynaha ayaa dhimatay muddo ka dib. Kani waa waddada uu siyaasadaha cimilada ee dhabta ah intiisa badan mareen.
somali.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Kaarboon-yaraynta way istaagtay. Farqiga la-qabsiga ayaa ballaadhay. Taageerada dadweynaha ayaa burburtay. Kani waa waddada aan isku dayno inaan ka fogaanno: saameynta cimilada oo isku uruurta iyada oo aan jirin kaabayaal bulsho ama farsamo oo lagu jawaabo.
somali.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Xaaladaha bilowga ah way shaqayn karaan. Ku kala firi maalgashiga 2-3 dhinac xilliga kowaad si aad u hesho xeerarka feedback-ka ee ugu horreeya shaqeeya. Waxbarashada dadweynaha + shirarka muwaadiniinta waxay bixiyaan gunno tartiib ah laakiin adkaysi leh.
somali.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Feedback togan ayaa xukuma; Dhulku wuxuu u kululaadaa dheelitir ka kulul. (Aqal-dhireed “aan la xakameyn karin” oo dhab ah — badaha oo kacaya oo uumi baxaya — waa xaalad Venus, ma aha Dhulka riixiddan.)
somali.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo sare + feedback taban. Waddada xilliga barafka.
somali.net_forcing_0_w_m_earth_equilibrium: Riixista saafiga ah ≈ 0 W/m². Dheelitirka Dhulka.
somali.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Riixistu waxay qayb ahaan is-buriyaan. Cimiladu si tartiib ah ayay u guurtaa.
somali.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Jaantuska dheelitirka tamarta: iftiinka qorraxda ee mowjadda gaaban wuxuu ka gudbaa lakabka gaaska aqal-dhireedka wuxuuna kululeeyaa dusha sare; dushu waxay soo daadisaa infrared, oo qayb ka mid ah lakabka gaasku uu nuugo oo hoos u soo daadiyo, isaga oo kuleylka qabsanaya.
somali.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Mala-awaal: Goorma ayuu albedo ka adkaadaa riixista GHG?
somali.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Sharax sida albedo, feedback-ka daruuraha, iyo GHGs ay si wadajir ah u kaxeeyaan xaalada cimilada.
